title: Jacques Cheminade: Can Europe play a key role in Science?
description:
Jacques Cheminade, President of Solidarité et Progrès, former Presidential Candidate, addresses the November 16-17, 2019 Schiller Institute conference in Bad Soden, Germany. 

See the full conference proceedings here, https://schillerinstitute.com/the-future-of-humanity-as-a-creative-species/
